title: Vladimir Putin Faces Open Criticism as Allies Break Silence
content:
Vladimir Putin has recently faced unprecedented open challenges regarding his actions in Ukraine. The controversy began after Remeslo, a former ally, published a video repeating his criticisms of the Russian leader's claims. Some analysts argued this could be a form of Kremlin political dark arts, acting as a staged provocation to identify those who might secretly oppose him. Others, like political commentator Philippov, suggested that Remeslo may simply be experiencing a mental breakdown. However, Remeslo firmly denied these allegations, claiming that none of his actions were staged and that he was merely speaking the truth.

He further rejected the idea that he had been directed by anyone within the government. 'People really overestimate the current administration, as they wouldn’t come up with such a clever plan,' Remeslo stated. He explained that he felt he could no longer remain silent on the country's direction. 'Putin is no longer one of us, but rather a person whose interests are completely alien to both Russia and me personally,' he added. Ultimately, Remeslo concluded that it is both possible and necessary to criticize the leader openly. This surprising dissent from a former supporter highlights growing cracks within Putin's circle.
